calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Brian Langedyk, appearing for Plaintiff, JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
No appearance by defaulted defendant JONATHAN L. HURSH

After reviewing the evidence, including the provided packet of documents and the proof of service, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED, AND DECREED that the plaintiff shall recover damages from defendant JONATHAN L. HURSH in the amount of:

$10,897.74 in Damages

The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

Dept. 624, Judge: Sharon Reardon, Clerk: Kevin Rayala. Not Reported
